rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Hearing & Notice Of Claim And Claim For Surplus Funds; Points & Authorities; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 3, 2024 line 1. RESPONDENT EKY BUILDER, INC.'s MOTION And Claim For Surplus Funds. Respondent Eky Builder Inc's Claim to Surplus Funds is DENIED. Application is not supported by admissible evidence. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: TOWERVIEW SF II, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. BARTHOLOMEW MURPHY ET AL

rulings.Case Title: TOWERVIEW SF II, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. BARTHOLOMEW MURPHY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 3, 2024 line 2. 2-DEFENDANT FRANK NOLAN, ANDREW WARREN, VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to identify the general damages sought as to each cause of action asserted against the moving defendants. Complaint is silent on this issue and the opposition only states what is not being sought (emotional distress). =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
